title: paraboea ferruginea
intro: Paraboea ferruginea is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the rusty paraboea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paraboea ferruginea include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Paraboea ferruginea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although its preparations and dosages should be guided by a healthcare professional.
